title: JSW Steel Global Group is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: JSW Steel Global Group is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with JSW Steel Global Group! We are hiring a Quality Control Engineer for our Chennai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About JSW Steel Global Group:
JSW Steel Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JSW Steel Global Group!
